# Artifacts for keep-latest-N testing
# name|size_bytes|creation_epoch|workflow_run_id
# Three artifacts per workflow, keep-latest 1 should keep only newest each
artifact-a1|1000|1699900000|wf-alpha
artifact-a2|2000|1699800000|wf-alpha
artifact-a3|3000|1699700000|wf-alpha
artifact-b1|4000|1699950000|wf-beta
artifact-b2|5000|1699850000|wf-beta
